info.name: Olympus Mobile Server - User APIs (External)
info.description:
Non-superadmin (Public + User Panel) endpoints of the Olympus Mobile Server.
Set serverUrl, clientApiKey and your login credentials in the environment, run 'Login as User' first, then any request.
Admin/superadmin endpoints are intentionally excluded.
